text:
pkg_info  | grep cacti
cacti-0.8.7a        Web-driven graphing interface for RRDTool

In cacti on proceed creating graphic which displaing load of interface (Template: Interface - Traffic (bits/sec)) after OUTBOUND located unnecessary tab-symbol ("\t")

see bug at
http://stalker-net.info/fls/bug/graph_image.png

P.S. Pardon for my English =)

How-To-Repeat: 1) install cacti-0.8.7a
2) creating graphic which displaing load of interface (Template: Interface - Traffic (bits/sec))
3) OUTBOUND....
